note: explain owns code-comprehension: how logic/architecture/behavior works and why it's designed that way. Near-misses lean toward docs-search (retrieve existing docs), debug (why is it BROKEN), migration-plan (plan a change), readme/documentation-writer (produce docs), and pr-review (find defects). mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: explain how the retry logic in src/net/client.ts works
walk me through what this reducer does, I just inherited it
why is the auth middleware structured this way with two passes?
i'm lost in flows/verify.ts — can you trace how a gate actually runs end to end?
what does the resolvePromptBody function actually do and why is it needed
help me understand the design rationale behind the single-server consolidation before my onboarding call
explain this regex, I have no idea what it matches: /^(?:[a-z0-9](?:[a-z0-9-]{0,61}[a-z0-9])?\.)+[a-z]{2,}$/
walk me thru how the elicit() wrapper degrades on clients without elicitation support
can you break down what happens when task-start hits the DoR gate — the whole control flow
my manager asked me to understand the kanban state machine, explain how a task moves between statuses
where is the caching behaviour documented?
queries.note: retrieve existing docs → docs-search, not explain the code

queries.text: why is this test failing with a null pointer, help me fix it
write documentation explaining how the auth module works for our wiki
review this PR and tell me what's wrong with the error handling
plan how we'd migrate this callback code to async/await
queries.note: plan a change with steps/risks → migration-plan

queries.text: how does React's useEffect cleanup work?
queries.note: third-party library docs, not this codebase → context7/docs, not the explain skill

queries.note: shares docs-search vocab ('where') but the ask is to explain the code behaviour

queries.text: walk me through why this function throws here — not asking you to fix it, I just want to understand the logic
queries.note: must beat debug: comprehension, not a fix
